mapper.sql: select id, customer_id, category_code, category_name, category_pinyin, del_flag, del_by, del_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sb_asset_category
mapper.select:
(del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (category_name like concat('%', #{categoryName}, '%') or category_pinyin like concat('%', #{categoryName}, '%')) and category_code like concat('%', #{categoryCode}, '%')
order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into sb_asset_category (id, customer_id, category_code, category_name, category_pinyin, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{categoryPinyin}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
